indicators.name: stone wall
indicators.rationale: Stone walls can be cold and uncomfortable to touch, affecting sleep quality.

indicators.name: hard floor
indicators.rationale: Hard floors are not comfortable to sleep on and can be noisy.

indicators.name: no bed or resting surface
indicators.rationale: No horizontal resting surface is present, making it unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: no windows or curtains
indicators.rationale: No natural light or privacy is available, affecting sleep quality.

reasoning_summary: The scene lacks a bed or resting surface, windows, or curtains, making it unsuitable for sleep. The stone wall and hard floor contribute to discomfort and noise, further reducing suitability.
